blended.narrative: Edelweiss Valley is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Wednesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
